theme: Premium Dark Theme (Material 3 Inspired with E1 Anti-AI Design Principles)

screens.auth: Centered card over abstract dark background. Glassmorphism panel. Minimalist inputs.
screens.bottom_tabs: Floating glassmorphism tab bar with active state glow, suspended 16px from the bottom edge.
screens.chat: Message bubbles with rounded corners (except corner adjacent to sender), subtle gradient for user, solid dark surface for others. Staggered entrance.
screens.rooms: Bento grid list of cards. Banners take up top 40% of card, gradient overlay to bottom dark. Explicit member count and active status.
screens.room_detail: Collapsing header with room banner, glassmorphic overlay for room title, tabbed navigation below.
screens.discover: Feed format, full-width or generous margins. Image aspect ratio 4:5 or 1:1. Emphasis on typography for captions.
screens.profile: Header with cover image, circular avatar overlapping, stats in a horizontal scroll row, badges displayed in a dense wrap grid.

interactions.list_item_appear: Staggered fade in and slide up (15px)

components.name: FloatingTabBar
components.description: Glassmorphic bottom tab bar, absolute positioned at bottom, slightly elevated from edges. Must have blur-xl and white/10 border.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small pill with icon and text, matching badge colors. Text color must have high contrast against the badge background.

components.name: RoomCard
components.description: Image background upper half, info lower half. Glassmorphic stats overlay on image.

components.name: MessageBubble
components.description: Dynamic sizing, primary color for current user, surface2 for others.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular image with optional online status indicator (green dot at bottom right) or inner border for VIPs.

avatars.description: grayscale photo of woman wearing necklace and top

room_banners.description: dark teal wavy shapes on black
a black and white photo of wavy lines

post_images.description: Explore a vibrant urban alley illuminated by neon signs and lights, capturing the essence of nightlife.
Atmospheric view of a narrow Istanbul alley at night with neon lights and a moody vibe.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and varied surface lightness.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating bars, headers, and modals.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use real SVG icons (e.g. lucide-react-native or @expo/vector-icons).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - press states (opacity/scale), transitions, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
Ensure minimum touch targets of 44x44 or 48x48 for all interactive elements on mobile.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
App is React Native Expo. Use StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind. Follow standard mobile UI patterns but make them feel luxurious and custom.
